privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All conversations encrypted locally. Your data never leaves your device.

alwaysOn.title: Always On
alwaysOn.description: Floating companion widget. Interact anytime from any application.

personalized.title: Personalized
personalized.description: Train your companion to think and act like you. True digital legacy.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Community-driven development. Transparent, auditable, and secure.

preview.title: YOUR COMPANION AWAITS
preview.description1: Your thinking companion. Share your interests, and watch as she learns to understand your perspective.
preview.description2: Every conversation encrypted and stored locally. Your thoughts and ideas are yours alone.

cta.title: READY TO DEPLOY?
cta.description: Click the floating button below to activate Athena. No sign-up required. Your privacy is guaranteed.

alerts.importFailed: Import failed. Check console for details.
alerts.fileError: Error processing file. Check console for details.

messages.empty: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

input.micUnavailable: STT not available for this provider

alerts.transcribeFailed: Failed to transcribe audio. Please try again.

errors.generic: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
errors.rateLimit: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.payloadTooLarge: Message too large. Try shortening your input or uploading a smaller file.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
errors.authError: Authentication error. Please check your API key.

companion.micUnavailable: STT not available for this provider

export.title: Export Conversations
export.description: Choose a format for exporting your conversation history with Athena.

json.title: JSON Format
json.description: Complete export with full structure. Best for backup and re-import.

markdown.title: Markdown Format
markdown.description: Human-readable transcript. Easy to read and share.

import.title: Import Conversations
import.description: Review the contents before importing to your database.
import.markdownWarning: Markdown imports are preview-only. Use JSON for full recovery.

settings.title: Settings
settings.savedDescription: Your settings and customizations have been saved.
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred interface language. Changes apply immediately.

customize.customTraitsHelp: Describe how your companion should behave and interact

model.supportsSTTHelp: Enable if this custom provider supports audio transcription
model.encryptionNotice: Encrypted locally, sent only to API providers for authentication

tuning.memoryWindowHelp: Number of recent messages included in each LLM request

voice.noVoices: No voices available for this gender
voice.globalKeyNotice: Using your global OpenAI API key
voice.encryptionNotice: Encrypted locally, sent only to API providers for authentication

privacy.enabledHelp: Usage analytics disabled — no telemetry data is collected
privacy.disabledHelp: Anonymous usage analytics enabled to help improve Athena
privacy.infoBox: Anonymous usage data helps prioritise features and fix issues. No conversations, personal data, or API keys are ever collected.

about.tagline: Privacy-first AI companion. Open source, locally encrypted.
